# ANANTH.DEV — Complete Profile

Ananth N is a full-stack developer and AI engineer from Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India.

## Skills
Python (Django, FastAPI), React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, AI/ML, LLMs, RAG, Prompt Engineering, UI/UX Design.

## Projects
- DevMatch: Developer social platform
- RAG Chat Bot: Retrieval-augmented generation document Q&A
- Naan Mudhalvan: Teaching 150+ students AI and BI

## Services
Full-stack development, AI solutions, UI/UX design, consulting, prompt engineering.

## FAQ
Q: What is RAG?
A: Retrieval-Augmented Generation combines document retrieval with LLM generation.

Q: Available for remote work?
A: Yes, worldwide.
